About Organization

Northern Coalfield Limited (NCL) is a government-owned coal-producer company in India. It is a subsidiary of Coal India Limited.
NCL is headquartered in Singrauli, Madhya Pradesh, and operates in the Singrauli coalfield, which is the largest coalfield in India.

About the Programme

The NCL HEMM Operator, Staff Nurse, and Overseer Civil Recruitment 2026 is a government job recruitment program in India. The program aims to recruit eligible candidates for various posts in NCL, including HEMM Operator, Staff Nurse, and Overseer Civil.
The program is open to Indian citizens who meet the eligibility criteria, and the selection process will be based on a written exam and other criteria as specified in the official notification.
